compressed_prompt: letter to friend, no caps, urge vote
response:
dear friend,

i’m writing this because i can’t stop thinking about what’s at stake right now. our voices matter, maybe more than ever. i know it’s easy to feel disconnected, or to think one vote doesn’t make a difference—but it does. it really, really does.

think about the things we care about: the kind of community we want, the future we imagine. none of that happens unless we show up. voting is the most direct way to shape it.

so please, make a plan. check your registration, find your polling place, mark the date. do it for yourself, for your neighbors, for all of us. it’s a small act that holds so much power.

i’ll be voting, thinking of you. let’s do this together.

your friend always
